creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter:  Firstly, I notice you are using DamnSmallBSD rather than 
FreeBSD - do you know if the kernel is different in any way between the 
two?  It may be best if we can rule that out first, is there any chance 
you could download the 7.0-RELEASE miniinstall ISO and try booting from 
that?  Also, it would be useful if at the same time you could also grab 
the 6.3-RELEASE mini-inst ISO and see if that succeeds or also fails to 
detect the disks. 
Lastly, it would probably be useful if you could perform a verbose boot 
of 7.0 and again take pictures of the bootup sequence from the point at 
which the kernel starts probing for disks (it's usually within the last 
six pages or so).
